allowedDivergences.reason: cel-go surfaces invalid string-to-int conversions as a generic runtime/type-conversion error rather than the more specific invalid_argument category used by Cel.Compiled.
cel-go surfaces invalid string-to-duration conversions as a generic runtime/type-conversion error rather than the more specific invalid_argument category used by Cel.Compiled.
Cel.Compiled permits heterogeneous numeric comparison at runtime for int/uint values, while the cel-go harness in this suite rejects this expression during checked compilation.
